title: Law Joins Doflamingo's Crew
description: Pages 11–14 focus on law joins doflamingo's crew, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Trebol, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Baby 5, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as law's childhood, the tragedy of Flevance, and his hatred for the world begin to explain why Doflamingo shaped his life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look. Those two are kids but they've survived, so to speak...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And the guy who's just come back is...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Cora-san! Here's some black tea. It's hot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you finish the job all right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gotta be honest about our money and all.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law, you said it was? This guy's an ex-active too. His name's...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: corazon. He's absent-minded and sorta stupid, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is the

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: He lives up to his blood- line. He's captain doffy's little brother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Some time ago, some traumatic event caused him to go mute.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Also. He hates kids. You've been warned.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We will be on hiatus next issue! We plan to resume publication in issue 45.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: He went face-first into that steel mine dasuyan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What the fuck is that crazy bastard's deal!?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Violet and Clumsy!? Who exactly was Corazon!?

summary: Law Joins Doflamingo's Crew advances the Dressrosa story through Trebol, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Baby 5, Unknown person #2, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
